title: What is really driving copper futures to record highs? Copper prices just broke every record as AI data center boom fuels global supply crunch
description: Copper prices are soaring aggressively in 2026 as copper futures smash record highs above $14,000 per ton and COMEX copper crosses $6.50 per pound. The rally is no longer only about manufacturing demand. AI data center construction is now driving a massive global copper rush. Chinas factory recovery, Middle East sulfuric acid shortages, and tightening mine supply are deepening the global copper crunch. Investors increasingly see copper as the backbone of artificial intelligence, electrification, and next-generation infrastructure growth.
content:

title: Trump lands in China ahead of high-stakes summit with Xi
description: The Iran war is expected to dominate talks between the two leaders over the next two days, with discussions on US arms sales to Taiwan, mutual trade and artificial intelligence also expected.
content:
United States President Donald Trump on Wednesday (May 13) landed in Beijing ahead of a high-stakes summit as he seeks to ramp up trade despite potential friction over Iran and Taiwan.

title: SoftBank’s OpenAI bet pays off with $45B Vision Fund gain

title: India can become world's AI skill capital if AI literacy doubles by 2030: IBM India MD
description: With the right investment in education and training, India is on track to emerge as the global hub for artificial intelligence skills by 2030. IBM India & South Asia's Managing Director, Sandip Patel, expresses optimism about this prospect, estimating that AI could inject over $500 billion into the country's economy.

title: India to use AI to protect consumers from money mule banking cyber fraud, announces Home Minister Amit Shah
description: Modi govt is tirelessly working for cyber secure Bharat. Mule accounts are big hurdles in curbing cyber crimes. Today, the I4C under MHA signed an MoU with Reserve Bank Innovation Hub (RBIH) unleashing the power of Artificial Intelligence to combat cyber fraud.

description: India could emerge as the global 'skill capital' for artificial intelligence (AI) if the country significantly expands its AI-literate workforce by 2030, according to IBM India & South Asia Managing Director Sandip Patel.

title: Gen Z Entrepreneurs Shift To Portfolio Careers With Multiple Income Streams: LinkedIn Report
description: Gen Z entrepreneurs have increasingly adopted multiple income streams as artificial intelligence tools and changing work preferences have driven a shift towards flexible portfolio careers

title: AI could add over $500 billion to India's economy by 2030: Study
description: Artificial Intelligence promises to boost India's economy by over $500 billion by 2030. Indian business leaders are optimistic about AI's role in GDP growth. However, many companies are still in the pilot phase of AI adoption. Key challenges include cloud infrastructure, data quality, and a growing skills gap. India aims for a human-centric approach to AI development.

title: AI: India's Potential USD 500 Billion Economic Booster by 2030
description: A joint study by IBM and IndiaAI suggests that Artificial Intelligence (AI) could contribute over USD 500 billion to India's economy by 2030. Despite optimism, the report highlights an 'inflection gap', with only 15% of organizations scaling AI effectively, indicating a need for more AI-literate professionals.
content:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is poised to significantly impact India's economy, potentially contributing over USD 500 billion by 2030, according to a study by IBM and IndiaAI.
